title: standards-artifact
description: Shape of a standards-tree artifact (charter / STACK / STD-area). Documents the fields the standards graph reads, including the two cross-tree seam fields a later layering resolver consumes. This slice parses-and-carries the seam fields; it does NOT resolve them across trees.

id.description: Parent-scoped id matching the type's grammar: VISION | STACK | ARCH-G<n> | STD-<SLUG> | STD-<SLUG>-RG<n> | STD-<SLUG>-RG<n>-R<n>

type.description: Artifact type (matches the on-disk `type:` and the node types: std_area/arch_goal/rule_group/rule); drives the ID grammar and the hierarchy placement

zone.description: On a STD-area: which H2 zone it lives in. `charter` (default) carries org-charter prose rendered to the code-standards digest; `operational` carries the review checklist rendered to a separate per-language checklist and exempt from the charter-goal orphan check.

arch_goals.description: On a charter: the goal list (expanded to arch-goal nodes). On a STD-area: the ARCH-goal id(s) this area addresses (its parent link).

metrics.description: REQUIRED on an arch-goal — the measurable target it commits to. An arch-goal with no metrics is flagged missing_metric.

rule_groups.description: On a STD-area: nested rule-groups, each carrying nested rules. Chosen layout: rule-groups and rules live in the STD-area file's frontmatter.

scope.description: Path globs this rule applies to (gitignore-style). Empty = applies everywhere / not scoped. Drives the review-time match. Default [].

severity.description: Rule severity; an unknown value coerces to info. Default info.

enabled.description: Whether the rule is active. A disabled rule still builds but is omitted from the rendered checklist. Default true.

floor.description: A floor rule cannot be relaxed by a downstream .user.yaml override (the override loader refuses it). Default false.

relates_to_std.description: Other rule/std ids this rule relates to (cross-reference, not a parent link). Default [].

detector.description: Optional machine detector for the rule: a regex string, or a mapping {type: grep, pattern, flags} (line-scan, always runs) or {type: shell, cmd} (trust-gated exec). A malformed shape coerces to null. Default null.

depends_on.description: Other standards ids this artifact depends on; a cycle in this relation is flagged dep_cycle.

applies_standards.description: SEAM (layering resolver, later slice). Cross-ref of inherited standards ids. This slice parses and carries it verbatim onto the node; it does NOT resolve inheritance across trees.

standards_compliance.description: SEAM (layering resolver, later slice). Map of standard id -> compliance status (e.g. compliant | exception-needs-DEC). This slice parses and carries it verbatim; it does NOT resolve compliance or synthesize edges from it. A malformed (non-map) value is carried raw without crashing the checks.
